description: Reference the detailed LLNL gasoline surrogate mechanism and benchmark reduced candidates for the laminar flame-speed leg.

candidates.description: Detailed LLNL gasoline surrogate mechanism used as the flame-speed reference.
candidates.notes: Reuses the existing LLNL diagnostic artifact by default because mechanism load alone takes several minutes.

candidates.description: Fuel-matched LLNL/UConn reduced gasoline surrogate chemistry file (679-species reduced mechanism I).
candidates.notes: This reduced mechanism reuses the shared thermo and transport files from the detailed LLNL gasoline-surrogate bundle, as expected by the LLNL distribution.

candidates.description: Fuel-matched LLNL/UConn reduced gasoline surrogate chemistry file (323-species reduced mechanism II).
candidates.notes: This is the more aggressively reduced LLNL gasoline surrogate chemistry file and reuses the shared thermo and transport files from the detailed bundle.

candidates.description: Cantera-bundled reduced n-dodecane mechanism used as a tractability benchmark until a reduced iso-octane or gasoline-surrogate mechanism is added.
candidates.notes: This candidate is not fuel-matched to the iso-octane reference and the bundled Cantera YAML lacks gas-phase transport data for c12h26, so use it only as a tractability benchmark, not as final validation sign-off.
